subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Beloved, my ultimate Purpose! This, Thy servant, hath journeyed from distant lands and far-flung regions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و محبوبی و مقصودی قد سعی عبدک هذا من بلاده الشاسعه و انحائها الواسعه و
subcodes.subjects: @law of pilgrimage, @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @spiritual transformation, @Shrines and Holy places, @prayer for the departed
